findings.detail: Node count 7 (within 3–8). All bold labels ≤ 4 words. All labels trace directly to corpus §6 Implementation steps 1–7 and §5 Core Concepts (vigilance, vigilance decay, automation complacency, accuracy paradox). Title 'Accuracy Paradox — How High Accuracy Erodes Vigilance' sits in the top-level title: YAML field as governing concept — not a ghost node. No bare acronyms. Single-path discipline: one straight N1→N2→N3→N4→N5→N6→N7 chain, no branches.

N1 'High accuracy observed' → §6 step 1; N2 'Trust rises' → §6 step 2 + §5 trust calibration; N3 'Monitoring effort drops' → §6 step 3; N4 'Vigilance decays' → §6 step 4 + §5 vigilance decay; N5 'System failure occurs' → §6 step 5; N6 'Human check fails' → §6 step 6; N7 'Error becomes real harm' → §6 step 7. No scope-creep nodes (no HITL design, Judgment Framework, or uncertainty surfacing — all deferred per scope constraints).

N1:::start (blue #a5d8ff) — system entry/observation. N2, N3, N4, N6:::hitl (yellow #fff3bf stroke-width:3px) — operator state/behaviour nodes, clearly distinguishing human-side degradation from system events. N5:::auto (purple #d0bfff) — system-side event (failure produced by AI/automated system). N7:::done (green #b2f2bb) — terminal harm outcome. Color tier split correctly mirrors the intent's 'human operator state shown at each step' requirement.

7-node linear LR chain matches the intent: 'linear pipeline'. Single-path discipline is clean. At 1400px width with 7 nodes (≈ 2–3 word labels), estimated 160px per node + 50px spacing = ~1420px total, fitting within the render target without truncation risk.

mmdc not available in this environment (consistent with established repo pattern — see 10-1, 10-2, 10-3 critic reports). Source pre-flight passes all checks. PNG render to be executed by orchestrator or CI step using: mmdc -i <mmd-path> -o <png-path> -w 1400 -b transparent

preflight.mermaid_parse: source review pass (mmdc not available for exit-code check)
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels match corpus §5/§6; on-headline, no scope-creep)
